title: Businesses Risk Losing AI Race: The Agentic Adoption Gap! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that businesses delaying agentic AI adoption face a widening competitive gap. He identifies hardware and foundational building blocks as critical factors for organizations to remain competitive in the AI era.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes the case that organizations delaying agentic AI adoption face a widening competitive gap against faster movers. It frames hardware and foundational building blocks as the critical factors for staying competitive in the AI era. The takeaway: the adoption gap compounds over time, and the underlying infrastructure layer (not just the agents themselves) determines who keeps pace.
